name: Niggies: Die Potgooi
overview: Viewers have been captivated by the captivating drama series ‘Niggies’ and the true events that form the basis of the story. That is why kykNET has now also produced a special podcast to complement their narrative about the kidnapping, rape and murder of twelve-year-old cousins ​​Issie Fourie and Petro Nel in 1966.

trailers.title: Amptelike Lokprent: Niggies: Die potgooi met Kabous Meiring | kykNET
